display.purpose: Hero headline only; the one raised voice, kept under 4rem.

body.purpose: Default prose, Ink Navy at 70% opacity.

label.purpose: Functional stat/column captions only — never a section eyebrow.

numeral.purpose: Every monetary figure, count and percentage, in Geist Mono tabular-nums.

shadows.name: drawer
shadows.purpose: Right-side subscription drawer lifting off the page.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Landing product mock floating above the hairline grid.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: The one easing curve — every entrance, toast and bar growth. No bounce.

motion.name: pulse-dot
motion.purpose: The only ambient motion — the live PulseMark by the wordmark.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action per view (Add, Save, Paid).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; height:40px; padding:0 20px; border:none; border-radius:12px; background:#047857; color:#fafaf9; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:rgba(4,120,87,.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #fafaf9,0 0 0 4px rgba(4,120,87,.4); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; height:40px; padding:0 20px; border:1px solid rgba(11,18,32,.15); border-radius:12px; background:#fff; color:#0b1220; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color .2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color:rgba(11,18,32,.3); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(11,18,32,.2); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Field with a calm green focus state; placeholder held to body contrast.
components.css: .ds-input { height:44px; width:280px; padding:0 14px; border:1px solid rgba(11,18,32,.15); border-radius:12px; background:#fff; color:#0b1220; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:rgba(11,18,32,.45); } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:#047857; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(4,120,87,.3); }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Active/Paused status — dot AND text, never color alone.
components.css: .ds-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:9999px; background:rgba(16,185,129,.1); color:#047857; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:500; } .ds-pill-dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:9999px; background:#10b981; }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Flat surface defined by a hairline and tonal step — no shadow at rest.
components.html:
Upcoming
Every recurring charge you're tracking.
components.css: .ds-panel { border:1px solid rgba(11,18,32,.1); border-radius:16px; background:#fff; padding:20px; } .ds-panel-title { font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:18px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:-.01em; color:#0b1220; } .ds-panel-body { margin-top:6px; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; line-height:1.6; color:rgba(11,18,32,.7); }

components.name: Renewal Badge
components.description: Signature countdown: dot + text, amber when urgent or overdue.
components.html: Renews today · Jun 24
components.css: .ds-renewal { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:500; color:rgba(11,18,32,.55); } .ds-renewal-dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:9999px; background:rgba(11,18,32,.25); } .ds-renewal--urgent { color:#b45309; } .ds-renewal--urgent .ds-renewal-dot { background:#f59e0b; } .ds-renewal-date { color:rgba(11,18,32,.4); }

components.name: Due Actions
components.description: Inline Paid / Cancel buttons shown on a charge that is due today or overdue.
components.css: .ds-due { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; } .ds-due-paid { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; height:32px; padding:0 12px; border:none; border-radius:8px; background:#047857; color:#fafaf9; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; } .ds-due-paid:hover { background:rgba(4,120,87,.9); } .ds-due-cancel { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; height:32px; padding:0 12px; border:1px solid rgba(11,18,32,.15); border-radius:8px; background:#fff; color:rgba(11,18,32,.7); font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; } .ds-due-cancel:hover { border-color:rgba(11,18,32,.3); color:#0b1220; }

narrative.overview: Outlay is a financial instrument that respects your attention — a clean accountant's ledger on a bright desk: hairline rules, exact figures in a monospace column, generous margins, no decorative flourish that doesn't help you read a number faster. A near-white Paper field, Card White surfaces split by 1px Ink Navy hairlines, and one working accent (Ledger Green) reserved for what you can act on. The job is calm certainty: surface what needs action (imminent renewal, price hike, charge due today) with restraint, never manufactured urgency. It works in Czech and English with equal grace.
keyCharacteristics: Paper field + white surfaces + 1px navy hairlines; flat by default.
One working accent (Ledger Green); amber strictly for attention.
All money in tabular monospace numerals.
Restraint over alarm; color never the sole signal.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Ledger/Signal green marks only what is actionable or yours; its scarcity is the signal.

rules.name: The Amber-Is-Attention Rule
rules.body: Amber means 'look here soon', never 'error'. Errors are red (#dc2626) gated behind confirm.

rules.name: The Navy-Opacity Rule
rules.body: Every gray is Ink Navy at an alpha, never a sampled neutral gray.

rules.name: The Money-Is-Mono Rule
rules.body: Every price, total, count and percentage is set in Geist Mono with tabular-nums.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: The small uppercase Label is a functional stat caption only — never a decorative section eyebrow.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest (hairline + tonal step); only overlays and the hero mock earn a shadow.

dos: Do set every monetary figure in Geist Mono with tabular-nums.
Do keep green for actionable-or-yours only; let its rarity do the work.
Do build every gray from Ink Navy at an alpha, never a sampled neutral gray.
Do pair amber with an icon or dot AND text so meaning never rides on color alone.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest — shadow only for true overlays.
Do test every label and heading in both Czech and English.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS template: no purple-blue gradients, hero-metric block, or identical icon+heading card grids.
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism as decoration.
Don't drift into corporate fintech: no cold navy-and-gold, no heavy formal weight.
Don't chase the crypto/hype look: no neon charts, blinking numbers, dark-mode-because-cool, animation overload.
Don't go cutesy: no mascots, childish illustration, or candy colors.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above section headings.
Don't use a colored border-left/right > 1px as a stripe accent.
Don't let amber read as 'error' — errors are red and gated behind confirm.
